hero.title: Turn visits into customers with a fast, clear and measurable Landing Page
hero.subtitle: Launch your Optimized Landing Page quickly, measure from day one, and improve with real data.
hero.description: Plans starting at 900 MXN/month. Includes domain, hosting and cloud analytics. Brand-aligned design, search-friendly, and clear calls to action to drive contact.
hero.badgesLabel: The features your new landing page will have:

featuresSection.title: Key benefits for your business
featuresSection.subtitle: Clarity, speed and measurement from day one to convert visits into customers with your landing page.

features.title: What is an Optimized Landing Page?
features.description: A page focused on a single goal: turning visits into customers. It avoids distractions and guides the visitor to contact or purchase.
benefits: One clear goal: contact, purchase or schedule
CTAs visible at the right moments
Fast load and simple navigation on mobile and desktop

features.title: Conversion-focused
features.description: Designed as a sales funnel: clear messages, social proof and calls-to-action that move users forward.
benefits: WhatsApp and CTAs always within reach
Ready for ads and social traffic

features.title: Measurement from day 1
features.description: We capture visits, clicks, and reading progress. You know what works and where to improve to sell more.
benefits: Key events: CTAs and WhatsApp contact
Reading data: what users see and where they drop
Base for optimizing texts, sections and forms

features.title: Powered by Amazon Web Services (AWS)
features.description: 24/7 availability and global speed with no own servers. We use AWS, the trusted cloud behind millions of companies.

features.title: Fast, stable and search-ready
features.description: Modern foundation with structured data for better search visibility. Fast, stable and ready to grow.
benefits: Fewer drop-offs on mobile and desktop
Optimization so search engines can find you
Scalable in the cloud when needed

features.title: AI-assisted content and improvements
features.description: AI-assisted proposals and copy, always reviewed by humans. More variants and better options faster.

services.title: Optimized Landing Page
services.description: Launch in days a fast, clear and measurable landing. Designed to turn visits into real customers.
benefits: Responsive design for mobile, tablet and desktop

services.title: Optimization & Analysis
services.description: Continuous improvement based on real data: A/B tests, content adjustments and impact-first priorities.

services.title: Guidance & Support
services.description: Support from start to finish: content, styling, publishing and basic maintenance.
benefits: Publishing on a reliable server with SSL certificates

testimonials.name: Mary Gonzalez
testimonials.content: In three months our conversion rate increased and cost per lead dropped. Clarity and speed made the difference.

testimonials.name: Charles Rodriguez
testimonials.content: We recovered the investment in 60 days. The measurement helped us optimize campaigns without overspending.

testimonials.name: Anna Fernandez
testimonials.content: Clear message, social proof, and visible CTAs: more real inquiries and better follow-up.

process.title: Discovery
process.summary: We understand your goals, value proposition and target audience.
process.content: Brief meeting to learn about your business, value proposition and audience. We define messages and prioritize essentials for quick launch.

process.title: AI-powered rapid prototype
process.summary: We show you a navigable demo with texts and initial design.
process.content: AI + human review for a demo with texts, colors and visual structure. You'll see how your landing would look.
detailItems: Basic measurement ready from the start

process.title: Review and changes
process.summary: We review together and adjust what impacts results the most.
process.content: Brief feedback, we prioritize highest-impact changes to align message and design.

process.title: Launch
process.summary: We publish your landing with active measurement and basic SEO.
process.content: Final adjustments, domain connection, active security certificates (SSL) and measurement verification.
detailItems: Active security certificates (SSL) and basic SEO

process.title: Real data
process.summary: We analyze results and propose actionable improvements.
process.content: We monitor clicks and contacts. We share simple report and suggestions for improvement.

process.title: Continuous improvement (optional)
process.summary: We test changes and improve based on data.
process.content: We continue testing variants and applying improvements based on results to attract more customers.

faqSection.footerQuestion: Do you have any other questions?
placeholderQuestions: What is a landing page and why do I need it?
How long does it take to create my landing page?
What does the complete service include?

faq.title: What is an Optimized Landing Page?
faq.content: It's a fast, clear page focused on a single goal: converting visits into customers. Includes measurement to know what works and where to improve.

faq.title: How long will it take to be ready?
faq.content: In days, depending on content and adjustments. We work with AI-assisted rapid prototypes and brief reviews to go to production as soon as possible.

faq.title: What does the subscription include?
faq.content: From 900 MXN/month: domain, hosting, cloud measurement, support and improvements. Optional: ES/EN version, simple reports and continuous optimization.

faq.title: Can I use my domain?
faq.content: Yes. We connect your current domain or help you set it up from scratch. We include SSL certificate.

faq.title: How will I see results?
faq.content: As an additional service, you can receive simple reports with key metrics: visits, CTA clicks and WhatsApp contacts.

faq.title: Can I have a Spanish and English version?
faq.content: Yes, it's optional. We show content in the visitor's preferred language and remember their choice.

faq.title: What exactly do we measure?
faq.content: Clicks on main buttons, WhatsApp contacts, reading progress and sections with most attention. This guides improvements with evidence.

faq.title: What do I need to get started?
faq.content: A brief description of your business, benefits to highlight, testimonials if you have them and current contact methods. If you have brand colors, they will also help.

conversionNote.title: What does a conversion improvement mean?
conversionNote.question: What does a conversion improvement mean?
conversionNote.explanation: It's an estimate based on industry data and comparable cases. We measure from day 1 to validate with real data and prioritize improvements.
conversionNote.conversionDescription: A +350% increase in conversion indicates significantly higher performance from your visits: more clicks on calls to action and more real contacts with the same budget.

statsStrip.title: Real, measured results
statsStrip.subtitle: Key metrics in your funnel
statsStrip.description: We track visits, CTA clicks and average time on page to prioritize improvements with data.

calculator.title: Conversion Calculator
calculator.subtitle: Estimate the impact on conversions and sales with your own setup
calculator.description: Based on industry averages and real cases; adjust size, industry, and visitors to simulate.

consent.title: Analytics & Cookies
consent.intro: Anonymous analytics are enabled by default to help us improve the experience. You can remove consent at any time in settings.
bullets: Helps fix issues and prioritize features.
You may opt-out at any time.

feedback.removed: Consent removed. Only essential events and anonymous session data are sent.
feedback.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove consent? Analytics will be disabled except for essential events.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Zoo Landing Page. All rights reserved.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of this landing page. By continuing to browse or interact with this website, you agree to these terms.
sections: Purpose and Content: This landing page showcases our services and provides educational content. Information is provided as-is and may change without notice.
Acceptable Use: You agree not to misuse the site, attempt unauthorized access, or interfere with its operation. Any abuse may result in restricted access.
Intellectual Property: All trademarks, logos, and content displayed are property of their respective owners and may not be reused without permission.
Privacy and Analytics: We use anonymous analytics, subject to your consent, to improve performance and user experience. See 'Use of Data' for details.

data.title: Data Privacy
data.intro: Analytics are enabled by default. We collect minimal, privacy-respecting information to improve this site. You may remove consent at any time.
points: Anonymous analytics are enabled by default. No personal data is required for basic usage.
Technical metrics (e.g., device, language, viewport, performance) help us fix issues and prioritize improvements.
If you remove consent, only essential events, session ID, and local ID are sent.
You may remove consent at any time by updating preferences.
data.consentNote: Analytics are enabled by default. By removing consent, only essential events and anonymous session data are sent.
